definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Both of them are correct.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN IT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]
definitions.usage_context_en: Usado para referirse a dos personas o cosas juntas (usado antes de 'the', 'my', 'them', 'us').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Used to refer to two people or things together (used before 'the', 'my', 'them', 'us').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: None of the students failed.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Ni uno solo de un grupo de tres o más.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Not one of a group of three or more.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: The entire quantity of a specific group.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Una gran cantidad de un sustantivo incontable específico.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: A large amount of a specific uncountable noun.]
